title: cdad Report
description: Schema for the machine-readable JSON export corresponding to the `cdad check` report output. The default human artifact is Markdown with YAML frontmatter; this schema describes the structured JSON representation of the same report data.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the report was generated.

repo.description: Repository name or identifier that the report describes.

score.description: Overall agent-readiness score on the 0 to 10 scale used by the toolkit.

band.description: Score band label derived from the overall score.

schema_version.description: Version of the report schema represented by the document.

summary.description: High-level human summary of the report.

overall_score.description: Repeat of the overall score for direct machine consumption.

human_summary.description: Two-sentence summary of what the score means.

primary_risk.description: The main failure mode if agents are used against the repository now.

static_scan_results.description: Signals found by the static repository scan.

capability_legibility_assessment.description: Assessment of the named capabilities from the questionnaire.

gap_inventory.description: Machine-readable list of gaps identified in the report.

recommended_next_step.description: Recommended next action for the practitioner after reading the report.

signal.description: Name of the static scan signal being reported.

found.description: Whether the signal was present in the repository.

score.description: Score contribution assigned to this signal.

legibility_score.description: Capability legibility score on the 0 to 4 scale.

questions.description: The four legibility questions and the answer for each one.

risk.description: Narrative risk statement for this capability.

question.description: Text of the legibility question that was asked.

gap_type.description: Gap category implied by the answer.

capability.description: Capability identifier affected by the gap.

gap_type.description: Type of gap recorded in the report.
